personal_info.name: Arjun S K
personal_info.title: Frontend Engineer & UI Craftsman
personal_info.tagline: Building the web, one thoughtful interaction at a time

professional_summary: I craft thoughtful web experiences that bridge design and technology. With 4+ years across the React, Vue, and Svelte ecosystems, I specialize in turning complex problems into clean, performant interfaces — from immersive 3D scenes to enterprise admin panels serving thousands of users.

achievements: Leading development of a facility platform using Nuxt.js and Tailwind CSS, managing 500+ facilities across multiple cities
Architected a scalable admin SPA with React, Vite, and Redux Toolkit for enterprise data operations
Engineered a queue-based JWT token rotation layer, ensuring 99.9% session continuity
Built an in-browser QR scanner with jsQR and Canvas API for real-time mobile check-ins
Established automated CI/CD pipelines for AWS EC2 deployment

experience.description: Logistics platform for truck booking and fleet management.
achievements: Developed the core admin interface using Nuxt.js and SCSS with modular, reusable components
Created UI modules for complex truck-booking workflows, streamlining logistics data management

experience.description: Dynamic web applications, 3D advertising, and OTT platforms.
achievements: Apex 3D Ad Platform: Built an immersive 3D ad experience with Vue.js, Tailwind, and Three.js
Cut page load times by 3 seconds through code splitting and aggressive asset optimization
NeoVision OTT: Engineered a custom video player with AI scene detection and frame-by-frame rendering
Delivered 15+ production web apps using React, Vue, and Next.js, serving 10,000+ active users
Increased mobile engagement by 45% through responsive interface redesigns
